message: Operation 'terminateProcessInstance' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks information about what termination means operationally, what is returned, and critical side effects (tasks stop, cannot resume). Added these details to help AI agents understand the consequences of this destructive operation.

data.description_suggestion: Terminates an active process instance, ending its execution. Requires the process instance ID as a path parameter. Returns confirmation of termination with the final instance state. Side effects: Stops all active tasks and operations within the process instance; the instance transitions to a terminated state and cannot be resumed.
data.reasoning: Description lacks information about what termination means operationally, what is returned, and critical side effects (tasks stop, cannot resume). Added these details to help AI agents understand the consequences of this destructive operation.

message: Operation 'suspendProcess' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks clarity about suspension semantics (pauses vs terminates), return value, and critical side effects (tasks halt but can resume). Added distinction from termination and clarification that suspension is reversible.

data.description_suggestion: Pauses execution of an active process instance without terminating it. Requires the process instance ID as a path parameter. Returns the updated process instance with suspended state. Side effects: Halts all active tasks and operations within the process instance; the instance can be resumed later to continue execution from the suspension point.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about suspension semantics (pauses vs terminates), return value, and critical side effects (tasks halt but can resume). Added distinction from termination and clarification that suspension is reversible.

message: Operation 'resumeProcess' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. data.description_suggestion: Resumes execution of a suspended process instance. Requires the process instance ID as a path parameter. Returns the updated process instance with active state. Side effects: Restarts execution of the process instance from the point where it was suspended; previously halted tasks and operations resume processing.
data.reasoning: Description lacks information about what resume does operationally, what is returned, and side effects on task execution. Added clarity about resumption behavior and state transitions for AI agent understanding.

data.current_summary: Reassign a task to another user
